/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/LaserModule.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LaserModule.dir/HikCamera/src/HikCamera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LaserModule.dir/UI/src/draw_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LaserModule.dir/YOLO/src/YOLOv11.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LaserModule.dir/detector/src/detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LaserModule.dir/pnp_solver/src/pnp_solver.cpp.o  -o LaserModule   -L/opt/MVS/lib/64  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/MVS/lib/64:/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.7.0 /usr/lib/libopenvino.so.2024.1.0 -lMvCameraControl -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.7.0
